arts.ttl: When Are Barcelona's Champions League Round of 16 Games?
arts.sum: Barcelona avoided Paris Saint-Germain and will play Benfica looking to reach the quarterfinals of the 2024-25 UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Opta Supercomputer puts Barcelona as second favorites to win the Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool came in as favorites prior to the draw for the round of 16, and they remain the most likely team to win the cup according to the Supercomputer. FC Barcelona are the second-most likely team to win the UEFA Champions League, after Liverpool FC, according to the Opta Supercomputer, and they were the team who most benefitted from the round of 16 draw.

arts.ttl: Barcelona's Road to the 2025 Champions League Final
arts.sum: Barcelona will likely have to get past Benfica, Borussia Dortmund and Inter Milan to reach the 2025 Champions League Final.

arts.ttl: Former Barcelona chief ‘hopes’ Vinícius Jr. moves to Saudi Arabia

arts.ttl: What is Hansi Flick’s stance on Vitor Roque returning to Barcelona?

arts.ttl: Liga Portugal hand Benfica a helping hand ahead of Barcelona showdown

arts.ttl: Barcelona's route to the Champions League 2024/25 final
arts.sum: Barcelona's route to the Champions League final has been set.

arts.ttl: Why Barcelona put Dani Olmo through a ‘genetic study’ this week
